questions.stem_en: A red octagonal (8-sided) sign means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 紅色八角形標誌表示：

options.text_en: Slow down and proceed with caution

questions.explanation_en: A red octagonal STOP sign means you must make a full stop at the marked limit line, crosswalk, or before entering the intersection.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 紅色八角形停車標誌（STOP）表示必須在限制線、人行橫道或進入路口前完全停車。

questions.stem_en: A red and white triangular sign means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 紅白三角形標誌表示：

options.text_en: Slow down and be ready to stop to let others pass
options.text_zhHant: 減速並準備停車讓他人先行

questions.explanation_en: A red and white triangular YIELD sign means you must slow down and be ready to stop to let any vehicle, bicyclist, or pedestrian pass.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 紅白三角形讓路標誌（YIELD）表示必須減速並準備停車，讓其他車輛、自行車或行人先行通過。

questions.stem_en: A red circle with a white horizontal bar on a sign means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 標誌上紅色圓圈中間有白色橫杠表示：
questions.explanation_en: A red circle with a white horizontal bar means DO NOT ENTER. You must not enter a roadway or ramp displaying this sign.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 紅色圓圈中間有白色橫杠表示禁止駛入。看到這個標誌不得進入該路段或匝道。

questions.stem_en: You see a white rectangular sign that says 'WRONG WAY.' What should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 您看到一個寫著「WRONG WAY」的白色矩形標誌。您應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Speed up to exit the area quickly
Stop and go back the way you came
Pull over and wait for help

questions.explanation_en: A WRONG WAY sign indicates you are traveling against the flow of traffic. Stop and go back the way you came.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 逆行標誌（WRONG WAY）表示你正在逆行。應立即停車並調頭返回。

questions.stem_en: Speed limit signs are what color and shape?
questions.stem_zhHant: 限速標誌是什麼顏色和形狀？
questions.explanation_en: Speed limit signs are white and rectangular, showing the maximum legal speed in miles per hour.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 限速標誌為白色矩形，顯示以英里/小時為單位的最高合法速度。

questions.stem_en: A white rectangular sign with a red circle and slash indicates:
questions.stem_zhHant: 白色矩形標誌上帶有紅色圓圈和斜線表示：

options.text_en: A prohibition of a specific action

questions.explanation_en: A white rectangular sign with a red circle and slash indicates a prohibition, such as NO U-TURN or NO LEFT TURN.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 白色矩形標誌上帶有紅色圓圈和斜線表示禁止某項行為，例如禁止掉頭或禁止左轉。

questions.stem_en: A ONE WAY sign with a black arrow indicates:
questions.stem_zhHant: 帶有黑色箭頭的單行道標誌（ONE WAY）表示：

options.text_en: Traffic flows in only one direction
options.text_zhHant: 該道路只允許單方向行駛

options.text_en: You must turn in the direction of the arrow

questions.explanation_en: A ONE WAY sign with a black arrow shows that traffic flows in only one direction on that road.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 帶有黑色箭頭的單行道標誌（ONE WAY）表示該道路只允許單方向行駛。

questions.stem_en: Yellow diamond-shaped signs are used to indicate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色菱形標誌用於表示：

options.text_en: Warnings about upcoming hazards or road conditions
options.text_zhHant: 前方危險或路況的警告

questions.explanation_en: Yellow diamond-shaped signs are warning signs that alert you to upcoming road conditions or hazards.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色菱形標誌是警告標誌，提醒前方可能有路況變化或危險情況。

questions.stem_en: A yellow pennant-shaped (triangular) sign on the left side of the road means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 道路左側黃色三角旗形標誌表示：
questions.explanation_en: A yellow pennant-shaped sign on the left side of the road means NO PASSING ZONE. You may not pass other vehicles in this area.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 道路左側黃色三角旗形標誌表示禁止超車區域。在該區域內不得超越前方車輛。

questions.stem_en: A round yellow sign with a black X and two R's indicates:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色圓形標誌上有黑色X和兩個R字母表示：
questions.explanation_en: A round yellow sign with a black X and two R's indicates a railroad crossing ahead. Slow down, look, and listen for trains.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色圓形標誌上有黑色X和兩個R字母表示前方有鐵路道口。需減速、觀察並傾聽是否有列車接近。

questions.stem_en: An orange diamond-shaped sign indicates:
questions.stem_zhHant: 橙色菱形標誌表示：

options.text_en: Construction zone or road work ahead

questions.explanation_en: An orange diamond-shaped sign indicates a construction zone or road work ahead. Slow down and watch for workers and equipment.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 橙色菱形標誌表示前方為施工區域。需減速行駛，注意施工人員和設備。

questions.stem_en: A pentagon-shaped (5-sided) yellow sign indicates:
questions.stem_zhHant: 五邊形黃色標誌表示：
questions.explanation_en: A pentagon-shaped yellow sign indicates a school zone or school crossing ahead. Watch for children and be prepared to stop.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 五邊形黃色標誌表示前方為學校區域或學校路口。注意兒童安全，隨時準備停車。

questions.stem_en: A yellow diamond sign with a curved arrow warns of:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色菱形標誌上帶有彎曲箭頭表示：

options.text_en: An upcoming curve in the road

questions.explanation_en: A yellow diamond sign with a curved arrow warns of an upcoming curve. An advisory speed may be shown below.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色菱形標誌上帶有彎曲箭頭表示前方有彎道。下方可能顯示建議速度。

questions.stem_en: What should you do when you see an orange construction zone sign?
questions.stem_zhHant: 當您看到橙色施工區標誌時應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Speed up to pass through quickly
Slow down and watch for workers and equipment
options.text_zhHant: 減速行駛，注意施工人員和設備

options.text_en: Make a U-turn and find another route

questions.explanation_en: When you see a construction zone sign, slow down and watch for workers and equipment. Fines for violations in construction zones are typically doubled.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 看到施工區標誌時需減速行駛，注意施工人員和設備。施工區域內違規罰款通常加倍。

questions.stem_en: Which sign shape is unique to railroad crossing warnings?
questions.stem_zhHant: 哪種標誌形狀是鐵路道口警告特有的？
questions.explanation_en: A round (circular) yellow sign is uniquely used for railroad crossing warnings.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 圓形黃色標誌是鐵路道口警告特有的形狀。

questions.stem_en: At a steady red light, you may turn right after stopping UNLESS:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在穩定紅燈時，停車後可以右轉，除非：

options.text_en: You are on a one-way street

questions.explanation_en: You may turn right on a steady red light after stopping, unless a sign prohibits it. You must yield to pedestrians and traffic.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 停車後可以在穩定紅燈時右轉，除非有標誌禁止。必須讓行人和車輛先行。

questions.stem_en: A steady yellow light means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 穩定黃燈表示：

options.text_en: Speed up to get through the intersection

options.text_zhHant: 無論位置如何立即停車

options.text_en: The red light is about to appear; stop if safe to do so
options.text_zhHant: 紅燈即將出現，如果能安全停車則停下

questions.explanation_en: A steady yellow light means the red light is about to appear. Stop if you can safely do so. If already in the intersection, continue through carefully.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃燈亮表示紅燈即將出現。如果能安全停車則停下。如果已經進入路口，應謹慎通過。

questions.stem_en: A flashing red light should be treated the same as:
questions.stem_zhHant: 閃爍紅燈應視同：
questions.explanation_en: A flashing red light means STOP. Treat it the same as a stop sign: come to a full stop and proceed when safe.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 紅燈閃爍與停車標誌相同，必須完全停車，確認安全後方可繼續行駛。

questions.stem_en: What does a green arrow signal mean?
questions.stem_zhHant: 綠色箭頭信號燈表示什麼？

options.text_en: You may turn in the direction of the arrow; oncoming traffic is stopped
options.text_zhHant: 可以向箭頭方向轉彎；對向車輛已被紅燈攔停

questions.explanation_en: A green arrow means you may turn in the direction of the arrow. Oncoming traffic is stopped, but you must still yield to pedestrians.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 綠色箭頭燈表示可以向箭頭方向轉彎。對向車輛此時為紅燈，但仍須讓行人先行。

questions.stem_en: How does a red arrow differ from a steady red light?
questions.stem_zhHant: 紅色箭頭與穩定紅燈有什麼不同？

options.text_en: You can still turn right on a red arrow after stopping
options.text_zhHant: 紅色箭頭停車後仍可右轉

options.text_en: You may NOT turn in the arrow direction even after stopping
options.text_zhHant: 即使停車也不允許向箭頭方向轉彎

options.text_en: A red arrow means yield, not stop
options.text_zhHant: 紅色箭頭表示讓行而非停車

questions.explanation_en: Unlike a steady red light where right turns may be permitted, you may NOT turn on a red arrow even after stopping.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 與普通紅燈不同，紅色箭頭亮時即使完全停車也不允許轉彎。

questions.stem_en: If a traffic signal is completely dark (not working), you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果交通信號燈完全熄滅（不工作），您應該：

options.text_en: Treat it as a yield sign
Treat it as an all-way stop
Wait until the signal starts working again

questions.explanation_en: If a traffic signal is not working, treat the intersection as an all-way stop. All vehicles must stop and yield to the driver who arrived first.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果交通信號燈不工作，將該路口視為全方位停車路口。所有車輛必須停車，先到者先行。

questions.stem_en: A flashing yellow light means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 閃爍黃燈表示：

options.text_en: Stop and wait for the light to change
The signal is broken; treat as a stop sign
options.text_zhHant: 信號壞了，視為停車標誌

options.text_en: Proceed with caution; you do not need to stop
Speed up to clear the intersection

questions.explanation_en: A flashing yellow light means proceed with caution. Slow down and be alert; you do not need to stop but must yield to hazards.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃燈閃爍表示謹慎通過。減速並保持警覺，不需要停車但必須讓行。

questions.stem_en: A yellow arrow signal means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色箭頭信號燈表示：

options.text_en: You may turn in the direction of the arrow
The protected turning phase is ending
options.text_zhHant: 受保護轉彎階段即將結束

options.text_en: Speed up to complete your turn
Oncoming traffic has a green light

questions.explanation_en: A yellow arrow means the protected turning phase is ending. Prepare to obey the next signal.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色箭頭燈表示受保護轉彎階段即將結束。準備遵守下一個信號燈。

questions.stem_en: When you have a steady green light at an intersection, you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在路口遇到穩定綠燈時，您應該：

options.text_en: Enter the intersection immediately without looking
Proceed only after yielding to vehicles and pedestrians still in the intersection
options.text_zhHant: 在讓路口內的車輛和行人先行後再通過

options.text_en: Honk your horn to warn pedestrians
Stop and wait for the light to turn yellow

questions.explanation_en: A steady green light means GO, but only after yielding to any vehicles, bicyclists, or pedestrians still in the intersection.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 綠燈亮表示可以通行，但須先讓已在路口內的車輛、自行車和行人通過。

questions.stem_en: Yellow lines on the road separate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 道路上的黃線分隔：

options.text_en: Traffic moving in the same direction

questions.explanation_en: Yellow lines separate traffic moving in opposite directions. White lines separate traffic moving in the same direction.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃線用於分隔對向車流。白線用於分隔同向車流。

questions.stem_en: A broken yellow center line means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色虛線中心線表示：

options.text_zhHant: 任何情況下都不得超車

options.text_en: You may pass if it is safe and you do not interfere with oncoming traffic
options.text_zhHant: 在安全且不妨礙對向來車的情況下可以超車
只有緊急車輛可以越線

questions.explanation_en: A broken yellow line means you may pass if it is safe to do so and you are not interfering with oncoming traffic.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色虛線表示在安全且不妨礙對向來車的情況下可以超車。

questions.stem_en: Double solid yellow lines mean:
questions.stem_zhHant: 雙黃實線表示：

options.text_en: No passing in either direction; you may cross to turn into a driveway
options.text_zhHant: 雙向均不得超車，但可越線轉入車道入口

options.text_en: The road is a one-way street

questions.explanation_en: Double solid yellow lines mean no vehicle may pass in either direction. You may cross them only to turn into a driveway or private road.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙黃實線表示雙向均不得超車或越線。只有在轉入車道入口或私人道路時才允許穿越。

questions.stem_en: A double solid white line means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 雙白實線表示：

options.text_en: Lane changes are allowed with caution
You are in a carpool lane

questions.explanation_en: A double solid white line means lane changes are prohibited. You may not cross it for any reason.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙白實線表示禁止變道。任何情況下都不得穿越雙白實線。

questions.stem_en: A two-way left-turn lane in the center of the road can be used by:
questions.stem_zhHant: 道路中央的雙向左轉專用道可由以下哪方使用：

options.text_en: Only traffic from the northbound direction
Traffic in both directions for left turns only
As a regular travel lane when traffic is heavy
options.text_zhHant: 車流量大時作為普通行車道

questions.explanation_en: A two-way left-turn lane is shared by traffic in both directions for left turns only. You may not travel in it for more than 200 feet.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙向左轉專用道由雙向車輛共用，僅用於左轉。不得在此車道行駛超過200英尺。

questions.stem_en: A red-painted curb means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 紅色路緣表示：

options.text_en: No stopping, standing, or parking at any time

questions.explanation_en: A red curb means NO stopping, standing, or parking at any time.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 紅色路緣表示任何時候都不得停車。

questions.stem_en: What does a blue-painted curb indicate?
questions.stem_zhHant: 藍色路緣表示什麼？

options.text_en: No parking from 7 AM to 6 PM

questions.explanation_en: A blue curb means parking for disabled persons only with a proper placard or license plate.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 藍色路緣僅供殘疾人停車，需持有有效殘疾人標牌或特殊車牌。

questions.stem_en: White lines on the road separate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 道路上的白線分隔：

options.text_en: Traffic moving in the same direction

questions.explanation_en: White lines separate traffic moving in the same direction. A broken white line means you may change lanes; a solid white line means stay in your lane.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 白線分隔同向車流。白色虛線表示可以變道，白色實線表示應保持在本車道。

questions.stem_en: A yellow curb means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 黃色路緣表示：

options.text_en: Loading/unloading only; noncommercial drivers must stay with vehicle
options.text_zhHant: 僅供裝卸貨物；非商業車輛司機須留在車內

questions.explanation_en: A yellow curb means loading/unloading only. Drivers of noncommercial vehicles must stay with the vehicle.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 黃色路緣僅供裝卸貨物，非商業車輛司機須留在車內。

questions.stem_en: A solid white line between lanes means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 車道之間的白色實線表示：

options.text_en: You should stay in your lane
You are on a one-way street

questions.explanation_en: A solid white line between same-direction lanes means you should stay in your lane. A broken white line means you may change lanes when safe.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 同向車道之間的白色實線表示應保持在本車道行駛。白色虛線表示在安全時可以變道。

questions.stem_en: Green highway signs provide information about:
questions.stem_zhHant: 綠色公路標誌提供以下哪方面的信息？

options.text_en: Motorist services like gas and food
options.text_zhHant: 駕駛員服務如加油站和餐飲

questions.explanation_en: Green signs provide direction and distance information, such as highway exits, city distances, and route markers.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 綠色標誌提供方向和距離信息，如高速公路出口、城市距離和路線標記。

questions.stem_en: Blue highway signs indicate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 藍色公路標誌表示：

options.text_en: Motorist services such as gas, food, and lodging
options.text_zhHant: 駕駛員服務如加油站、餐飲和住宿

questions.explanation_en: Blue signs indicate motorist services such as gas stations, food, lodging, and hospitals.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 藍色標誌表示駕駛員服務設施信息，如加油站、餐飲、住宿和醫院。

questions.stem_en: Brown highway signs indicate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 棕色公路標誌表示：

options.text_en: Recreation areas, parks, and historical sites
options.text_zhHant: 休閒區域、公園和歷史景點

questions.explanation_en: Brown signs indicate public recreation areas, scenic routes, parks, and historical sites.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 棕色標誌表示公共休閒區域、風景路線、公園和歷史景點。

questions.stem_en: An octagon-shaped sign always means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 八角形標誌總是表示：
questions.explanation_en: An octagon (8-sided) shape is exclusively used for STOP signs.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 八角形標誌專門用於停車標誌（STOP）。

questions.stem_en: A diamond-shaped white sign with 'HOV' in black marks a lane that requires:
questions.stem_zhHant: 白色菱形標誌上寫有「HOV」黑色字樣的車道要求：

options.text_en: All vehicles must drive at a minimum speed
options.text_zhHant: 所有車輛必須以最低速度行駛

options.text_en: Only electric vehicles may use the lane
options.text_zhHant: 只有電動車可以使用該車道

options.text_en: The required number of occupants (usually 2+) during posted hours
options.text_zhHant: 在規定時段內車內需有規定人數（通常2人以上）

questions.explanation_en: An HOV (High-Occupancy Vehicle) lane requires the posted minimum number of occupants, usually 2 or more, during posted hours.
questions.explanation_zhHant: HOV（高承載車輛）車道在規定時段內要求車內人數達到標注的最低要求，通常為2人以上。

questions.stem_en: Which sign shape indicates a school zone?
questions.stem_zhHant: 哪種標誌形狀表示學校區域？
questions.explanation_en: A pentagon (5-sided) shape is used for school zone signs.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 五邊形標誌用於學校區域。

questions.stem_en: A triangle-shaped sign always means:
questions.stem_zhHant: 三角形標誌總是表示：
questions.explanation_en: A triangle shape is exclusively used for YIELD signs.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 三角形標誌專門用於讓路標誌（YIELD）。
